svg.title: nagent Template — Neuron Anatomy → AI Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Multipolar neuron diagram mapping the 8 nagent template folders to AI agent components: 01-Dendrite (inputs: MCP connectors, APIs, sensors, user messages) — 02-Cell Body (LLM reasoning, planning, models, CoT/RAG strategies) — 03-Nucleus/DNA (system-prompt.md, identity.yaml, guardrails.yaml, CLAUDE.md) — 04-Axon (multi-step workflows and execution pipelines) — 05-Myelin Sheath (SKILL.md packages for accelerated execution) — 06-Node of Ranvier (checkpoints: quality gates, human-in-the-loop, verify/retry/escalate) — 07-Axon Terminals (outputs: files, messages, API calls, notifications, deliverables) — 08-Synaptic Plasticity/Memory (short-term session, long-term persistent, learned preferences — spans all layers).
svg.text: Signal flow: 01 receive → 02 integrate → 03 identity → 04 execute → 05 accelerate → 06 verify → 07 output ↻ 08 remember
